reason: Successfully navigated to the agent, verified status, sent a message "Hello! What is 2+2?", received a response containing "4", and captured a screenshot
steps: Step 1: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Page loaded successfully, displaying the Gamut app with sidebar showing agents
Step 2: Clicked on "QA-20260706-164640-fo6z" agent in sidebar — Agent page loaded successfully, navigated to agent detail page
Step 3: Verified agent status — Agent status is "idle" which satisfies the requirement (running or idle)
Step 4: Sent message "Hello! What is 2+2?" — Message was typed in the input field and sent by clicking the Send button, page navigated to chat session "Math Basics Quick Calculation"
Step 5: Waited for response — Agent processed the message and returned a response within 5 seconds (well under the 3-minute timeout)
Step 6: Verified response contains "4" and took screenshot — Response clearly displays "4" as the answer to 2+2, screenshot captured showing the full chat with user message and agent response
